author: y4rr
content:
Sprint B.1 complete. Fixed 4 GPU kernel bugs:

#892 gpu_batchnorm_forward stub: real two-pass PTX kernel (pass-1 parallel reduce mean+var, pass-2 normalize+affine). Fixed smem addressing (mov.u64 base + add.u64 offset pattern), fixed tree reduction init from bdim/2 instead of hardcoded 128 (caused OOB smem reads with <256 threads -> NaN). Output has ~zero mean / ~unit std per channel in training mode.

#893 gelu_tanh_kernel INVALID_PTX: non-ASCII chars pi and superscript-3 in PTX comment bytes caused CUDA_ERROR_INVALID_PTX on sm_86 JIT. Replaced with ASCII 'pi' and '^3'.

#894 avgpool2d_forward_kernel INVALID_PTX: em-dash in PTX comment caused same CUDA_ERROR_INVALID_PTX. Replaced with '--'.

#897 capture stream invalidation: added gpu_add_into_on_stream for explicit stream dispatch. Conformance test now uses dedicated non-default stream with ThreadLocal capture mode; parallel tests on device.stream() cannot invalidate the capture.

79+108 conformance tests live, 5 probe tests pass, clippy clean.
